---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea or new level/obstacle feature for the game
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement, good first issue
assignees: ''

---

**Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.**
A clear description of what the problem is or what feature is missing.

**Describe the Solution You'd Like**
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen (e.g. new level, new obstacle, new character skin, or new Web Audio sound effect).

**Describe Alternatives You've Considered**
Any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

**Additional Context**
Add any other context, screenshots, or visual sketches about the feature request here.
